steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes “though only nineteen” while describing Elinor as her mother's counselor, capable of governing her strong feelings—“a knowledge which her mother had yet to learn.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D is correct: Elinor is remarkably mature for her age.

The passage shows her making sound judgments and controlling emotions while still a teenager, abilities her mother lacks.

  • A contradicts her “effectual advice”
  • B contradicts her “coolness of judgment”
  • C overstates what's stated
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
